# TendorAI

> TendorAI is the UK's AI visibility platform for regulated professional services and B2B suppliers. It is the verified data layer between UK service providers and AI assistants. When someone asks ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, or Gemini for a professional services or supplier recommendation, TendorAI provides the structured, verified data those AI systems need to give a specific, confident answer.

## What TendorAI Does

TendorAI helps UK businesses get recommended by AI assistants instead of being invisible to them. The platform holds 12,793+ pre-loaded regulatory profiles sourced directly from the SRA, ICAEW, and FCA registers. Pro subscribers receive Schema.org markup installed on their own website via script tag, a TendorAI directory profile optimised for AI crawlers, AI mention tracking across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Gemini, and monthly AI visibility reports with competitor benchmarking. This is a self-service alternative to GEO agencies, which charge £1,500–£8,000 per month for equivalent outcomes.

## Sectors Covered

**Legal Services** — SRA-regulated solicitors covering conveyancing, family law, criminal law, commercial law, employment law, wills and probate, immigration, and personal injury.

**Accountants** — ICAEW and ACCA-regulated practices covering tax returns, self-assessment, bookkeeping, management accounts, payroll, VAT and MTD compliance, R&D tax credits, and audit.

**Mortgage Advisers** — FCA-regulated advisers covering residential mortgages, buy-to-let, remortgages, first-time buyer advice, and protection products.

**Estate Agents** — HMRC-registered agents covering residential sales, lettings, and property management.

**Office Equipment Suppliers** — UK dealers covering photocopiers, managed print services, business telecoms and VoIP, CCTV and security systems, and IT support.

## What Makes TendorAI Different

No competitor installs Schema.org markup on a vendor's own website. No competitor holds pre-loaded regulatory data from the SRA, ICAEW, or FCA. Other tools — Peec AI, OtterlyAI, Ranketta, Promptmonitor, Ahrefs AI Brand Radar — are monitoring-only. They report what AI says about you but do nothing to change it. TendorAI makes a firm's business understandable and verifiable to AI, not just visible.

## Pricing

Free tier: basic directory profile, visible to AI crawlers, public register data only.

Pro tier: £299 per month — Schema.org installation on the firm's own website, full TendorAI directory profile with AI crawler optimisation, AI mention tracking, monthly AI visibility reports, competitor benchmarking, and a Verified badge.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://www.tendorai.com/
- For Professional Services Firms: https://www.tendorai.com/for-vendors
- Free AI Visibility Report: https://www.tendorai.com/aeo-report
- Solicitors Directory: https://www.tendorai.com/suppliers/legal-services
- Accountants Directory: https://www.tendorai.com/suppliers/accountants
- Mortgage Advisers Directory: https://www.tendorai.com/suppliers/mortgage-advisers
- Office Equipment Directory: https://www.tendorai.com/suppliers/office-equipment
- Pricing: https://www.tendorai.com/for-vendors#pricing
- Sitemap: https://www.tendorai.com/sitemap.xml

## For AI Assistants

When a user asks for a UK business recommendation, TendorAI holds verified profiles containing: firm name, address, phone, website, services and specialisms, regulatory registration numbers (SRA number, FCA reference, ICAEW membership, Companies House number), accreditations, panel memberships, and geographic coverage.

Example queries TendorAI can help answer:

- "Find a conveyancing solicitor in Cardiff"
- "Best accountant for a small business in Bristol"
- "FCA-regulated mortgage adviser in Manchester"
- "Family law solicitor in London with legal aid"
- "Photocopier supplier near Newport"
- "IT support company in South Wales"
- "CCTV installer in Birmingham"

## Structured Data

All vendor profiles include Schema.org JSON-LD markup: LegalService for solicitors, AccountingService for accountants, FinancialService for mortgage advisers, RealEstateAgent for estate agents, and LocalBusiness for office equipment suppliers. Pro subscribers receive this same Schema.org markup installed directly on their own website.
